title: Pandora's Garden Modpack
description: This is a Modpack for the server Pandora's Garden
body:
# 🌿 Pandora’s Garden – Official Modpack 🌿

This is a modpack for the server Pandora’s Garden SMP. It is intended to give an immersive multiplayer experience while you play. Each and every mod was chosen to improve your experience.

## What the Modpack adds:
- Mini Map
- Optimization
- Waypoints
- Voice Chat
- Quality of life features

## What the Server adds:
- Waystones
- Claims
- Player run Economy
- McMMO
- Togglable PVP
- Graves

IP: mc.PandorasGarden.net
